aboutPreview.heading: About me
aboutPreview.bio1: I'm a full-stack developer passionate about creating digital experiences that make a difference. With years of experience across diverse projects, I combine creative design with robust code to deliver solutions that exceed expectations.
aboutPreview.bio2: My approach is user-centered and results-driven. I believe technology should serve people, and every project is an opportunity to create something that truly impacts lives and businesses.

aboutPage.title: About
aboutPage.metaDescription: Meet Luan Campos K. — a full-stack developer with over 8 years of experience creating creative and high-performance digital experiences.

aboutBio.heading: About me
aboutBio.paragraph1: I'm a full-stack developer with over 8 years of experience building digital products that blend creative design with high-quality engineering. My journey started with a curiosity about how things work on the web — and grew into a passion for creating experiences that truly matter.
aboutBio.paragraph2: Over the years, I've worked with startups, agencies, and tech companies, always striving for the right balance between performance, accessibility, and aesthetics. I believe the best code is the one that serves people — invisible to the user, yet powerful behind the scenes.
aboutBio.paragraph3: My approach is user-centered and results-driven. Every project is an opportunity to solve real problems, simplify complexity, and deliver measurable value. I thrive on challenges that push me out of my comfort zone and allow me to learn something new.

nexus.description: Technical leadership on high-impact projects for enterprise clients. Architecting scalable solutions with Next.js, Node.js, and AWS services.

techvista.description: Building SaaS and e-commerce platforms. Implementing CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices for continuous delivery.

criativa.description: Creating responsive and accessible interfaces with a focus on performance. Working closely with design teams to turn prototypes into code.

startup.description: Early career building features for web applications. Accelerated learning in agile methodologies and coding best practices.
